findings.title: Duplicate PipelineEvent type definitions
findings.why_it_matters: Duplicate type definitions create confusion and inconsistency in the documentation
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the duplicate PipelineEvent definition in Appendix C and keep the comprehensive one in section 3.3

findings.title: Missing implementation of ClarificationQuestion type
findings.why_it_matters: The FrontendResult type references ClarificationQuestion but no definition is provided
findings.suggested_fix: Add a type definition for ClarificationQuestion in the core types section

findings.title: Mismatched TaskPlugin interface and directory structure
findings.why_it_matters: The TaskPlugin interface defines a 'critique' method but the reasoning task directory doesn't include a critic.ts file
findings.suggested_fix: Either add critic.ts to the reasoning task directory or update the TaskPlugin interface documentation to note optional critique implementation
evidence:
interface TaskPlugin {
  type: TaskType
  buildPrompt(params: PromptParams): string
  buildTools(params: ToolParams): Record<string, CoreTool>
  execute(params: ExecuteParams): Promise<TaskExecuteResult>
  critique?(params: CritiqueParams): Promise<CritiqueResult>
}

└── reasoning/
       ├── index.ts
       ├── executor.ts
       ├── prompt.ts
       ├── tools.ts
       ├── verdict.ts
       └── types.ts

findings.title: Ambiguous reference to 'engine/agent/executor.ts'
findings.why_it_matters: The document references moving Reasoning task from 'engine/agent/executor.ts' but no such file is mentioned in the directory structure
findings.suggested_fix: Clarify the exact path or reference for the source of the Reasoning task being migrated
evidence: Reasoning（通用推理，从 engine/agent/executor.ts 迁入）

findings.title: Inconsistent event type naming
findings.why_it_matters: Different event type names for similar concepts (executor_step vs executor_start, tool_call/tool_result vs no equivalent in section 3.3)
findings.suggested_fix: Align event type names between the two PipelineEvent definitions and ensure all event types are consistently documented

residual_risks: The duplicate PipelineEvent definitions could lead to inconsistent implementation of streaming events
Missing ClarificationQuestion type could cause confusion during Frontend implementation
deferred_questions: What is the exact path of the source file for the Reasoning task being migrated from engine/agent?
Should the reasoning task include a critic.ts file given the optional critique? method in TaskPlugin interface?
Are there any other event types that should be included in the comprehensive PipelineEvent definition?
